remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target creature card in your graveyard gains encore until end of turn. The encore cost is equal to its mana cost. (Exile the creature card and pay its mana cost: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature card in your graveyard
remaining_params.CostDesc: {T}, Exile cards from your graveyard equal to the number of opponents you have:
